name: Cheerful Robin
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a plump cheerful robin perched on a thin twig, a round body with a puffed-out breast, a short pointed beak, a small wing tucked at its side, two tiny clawed feet gripping the branch, a happy eye and a couple of leaves nearby

name: Wise Owl on a Branch
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a wise round owl perched on a sturdy tree branch at night, two big front-facing eyes, little feather tufts on its head, a short hooked beak, fluffy patterned chest feathers, and a crescent moon and a few stars in the sky behind it

name: Proud Peacock
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a proud peacock standing tall with its enormous tail fanned out in a wide half-circle behind it, rows of large eye-shaped feathers, a small crest of feathers on its head, a slender neck, and dainty feet

name: Colorful Parrot
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a colorful parrot gripping a leafy tropical branch with both feet, a curved hooked beak, a rounded head, long layered tail feathers hanging down, one wing slightly raised, and a couple of big leaves and a hanging vine around it

name: Baby Chick
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a tiny fluffy baby chick standing in grass, a very round soft body, big sparkly eyes, a small triangular beak open as if peeping, two short stubby legs, and one little wing lifted, looking adorable and simple

name: Flamingo on One Leg
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a graceful flamingo standing on one long thin leg in shallow water, the other leg tucked up, a long curved S-shaped neck, a head bent down low, a thick down-curved beak, and gentle water ripples around its foot

name: Hummingbird at a Flower
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a tiny hummingbird hovering in mid-air beside a large trumpet-shaped flower, wings spread wide and blurred-fast, a very long thin needle beak dipping into the bloom, a small streamlined body and a fanned little tail

name: Cardinal in Winter
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a cardinal perched on a snowy pine branch, a pointed crest of feathers on top of its head, a short thick triangular beak, a small mask around its eye, a rounded body and tail, with a few pine needles and falling snowflakes

name: Toucan Close-Up
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a close-up portrait of a toucan's head and shoulders, an enormous oversized curved beak taking up most of the picture, a large round friendly eye, smooth head feathers, and a leafy jungle leaf behind it

name: Duck on the Pond
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a happy duck floating on a calm pond, a smooth rounded body, a flat broad beak, a small wing folded on its back, gentle ripples spreading out around it, a cattail reed and a lily pad with a flower nearby

name: Eagle Soaring
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a majestic eagle soaring through the sky with both wings spread wide and full of layered feathers, a sharp hooked beak, strong taloned feet tucked beneath it, a fanned tail, and a few small clouds and distant mountain peaks below

name: Bird Family in a Nest
subject: animals/bird
prompt: a mother bird standing on the edge of a round twig nest feeding three tiny baby birds, the little chicks with open beaks reaching up eagerly, two speckled eggs still in the nest, all resting on a leafy branch
